title: broughtonia negrilensis
intro: Broughtonia negrilensis, also known as the Jamaican Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and act as an antispasmodic, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as hypertension and anxiety. The health benefits of Broughtonia negrilensis include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may also help to reduce the risk of certain diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
